abilities.description: You may play it. Activate only as a sorcery and only if there are eight or more permanent cards in your graveyard.

effect.description: You may play it. Activate only as a sorcery and only if there are eight or more permanent cards in your graveyard.
effect.name: Play

triggers.description: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose target creature card in your graveyard. Conjure a duplicate of it into your graveyard.
